title: NOVA Field — Ambient Computing (Gemini build)
special: COMBINED-EFFECT flagship: preloader counter · Lenis smooth scroll · Three.js procedural WebGL hero (+ fallback) · GSAP ScrollTrigger pinned scroll-story · horizontal showcase · custom cursor + magnetic buttons · request-field-test modal form · reduced-motion aware. Loads CDN libs (Three.js/GSAP/Lenis/Tailwind/Lucide).
summary: An immersive, combined-effect flagship launch page for a fictional ambient-computing device: WebGL procedural hero, smooth scroll, pinned scroll-story, horizontal showcase, custom cursor, and a request modal — built by GeminiStudio from Ra's brief.
summary_vi: Trang ra mắt flagship nhiều-hiệu-ứng cho thiết bị ambient-computing giả định: hero WebGL procedural, smooth scroll, scroll-story pinned, showcase ngang, custom cursor, modal đăng ký — do GeminiStudio dựng từ brief của Ra.
provenance: Generated by Google AI Studio (GeminiStudio) from Ra's brief; security-audited by Ra (CDN libs only, no API/fetch/eval/keys). AI Studio Vite/React scaffold dropped — index.html is standalone.
